items.title: Despite being stuck at the bottom of the #Knicks bench, Jeremy Sochan has maintained a positive approach.
items.author: Tom Orsborn
items.body_excerpt:
Despite being stuck at the bottom of the #Knicks bench, Jeremy Sochan has maintained a positive approach.

In a pre-game interview, he also discussed how he remains grateful for his 3-plus seasons in San Antonio and his relationship with Pop.

media.title: Jeremy Sochan trying 'not to be cancer' while playing little for Knicks
media.description: The former Spurs forward discussed his situation with New York and his emotions surrounding his return to San Antonio for the NBA Finals.

items.title: Jeremy Sochan told me he’s “staying ready, being the best teammate he can be” while sitting at the end of Knicks bench:
items.author: Tom Orsborn
items.body_excerpt:
Jeremy Sochan told me he’s “staying ready, being the best teammate he can be” while sitting at the end of Knicks bench: 

“Not all 18 guys can play on the court, so you have to accept that part and not be a cancer to the team.”

items.title: Jeremy Sochan on how to slow down Wemby: “Being that tall he gets tired…Give him different looks and (not beat him up but) be very physical, and make him run. And he’s gonna get tired, he’s gonna have to take some plays off in my opinion”
items.author: RyanTannegod
items.body_excerpt: Jeremy Sochan: “Whether I’m playing or not, it’s important to feed all the information I have. And I think I know quite a lot. Being that tall he gets tired…Give him different looks and be very physical, and make him run. And he’s gonna get tired, he’s gonna have to take some…
